items: Highlight placement-aligned projects on the first page.
Keep GPA and college details current.
Use quantified bullets for every experience or project.
Show cloud, data, and ML evidence where applicable.
Add AWS and data engineering coursework clearly.
Keep resume to one page unless a later draft needs more space.
Maintain consistent tense, formatting, and alignment.
Add links for GitHub, live demo, and certificates where useful.
Tailor the summary for each target role family.
Review keywords against job descriptions before applying.
Add one strong achievement metric for each major project.
Refresh the resume before peak season begins.
